title: A Night Flight
content: Sophia’s flight departed late in the evening. After boarding, she looked out the window as city lights became smaller and smaller below. The cabin lights dimmed, and many passengers quickly fell asleep. Sophia listened to music and watched a movie during the flight. Occasionally, she looked outside and saw stars above the clouds. The atmosphere felt calm and peaceful compared to busy daytime flights. When the plane landed early the next morning, Sophia felt tired but excited to begin exploring a new destination.
